objective: Sweep current and candidate component-source families for fresh value-unique signature capacity after the Wave 49 14-row ceiling.
non_negotiables: This is a capacity-only source sweep, not a promoted shard.
The report must mark current_selection_evaluated=false so zero current-selection fields are not mistaken for selector failures.
A source family only counts as scale progress if it raises the component-value capacity ceiling or later increases selected exact rows under the value-unique selector.
If the rank-4/5 ladder does not improve capacity, route the next wave toward a different component-value source family or a documented value/split rule.

tasks.prompt: Add a value-unique signature source-sweep report over baseline, edge ladder, current combined source, rank-4/5 ladder, and combined rank-4/5 variants.
outputs: Regression test recording the rank-4/5 no-gain result
acceptance: The current combined source remains at component_value_capacity_upper_bound=14.
The rank-4/5 ladder source has component_value_capacity_upper_bound=9.
The combined rank-4/5 source raises signature-profile counts to 96/96 but keeps component_value_capacity_upper_bound=14.
The report is fast enough for routine source sweeps because it does not run current selection for every source.

tasks.prompt: Run the Wave 50 source-sweep report and record the hash.
acceptance: No swept source exceeds the Wave 49 14-row capacity ceiling.
The rank-4/5 ladder no-go is documented as evidence for the next source-design wave.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 50 as evidence that the tested rank-4/5 component-source family does not resolve the current component-value capacity ceiling.
acceptance: Docs state that the rank-4/5 ladder is a no-gain source under the current value rule.
Docs do not present capacity-only source sweeps as exact shards or model results.
Docs route the next wave toward a different component-value source family or value/split rule.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_50_value_unique_signature_source_sweep.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 50 plan is internally consistent.

integration_gates.command: jq 'all(.sources[]; .current_selection_evaluated == false) and ([.sources[].component_value_capacity_upper_bound] | max == 14) and (.sources[] | select(.source == "rank4_minor_ladder_v0") | .component_value_capacity_upper_bound == 9)' docs/non_fixture_composition_value_unique_signature_source_sweep_wave_50_report.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The rank-4/5 source sweep is recorded as a capacity no-go.
